name: ai-context-bridge-vscode
description: Collect, compress, and transfer project context to any AI assistant. Local-first.

commands.title: AI Context Bridge: Send Context to Bridge
AI Context Bridge: Preview Collected Context
AI Context Bridge: Show Status Panel
AI Context Bridge: Open Context Inspector

aiContextBridge.bridgeUrl.description: Base URL of the local bridge server.

aiContextBridge.flags.collectActiveFile.description: Include the active file's content in collected context.

aiContextBridge.flags.collectSelection.description: Include the current selection in collected context.

aiContextBridge.flags.collectDiagnostics.description: Include workspace diagnostics (errors/warnings) in collected context.

aiContextBridge.flags.collectTerminal.description: Include recent terminal output in collected context (opt-in: terminal buffers may contain secrets).

aiContextBridge.flags.collectGitDiff.description: Include the working-tree git diff in collected context.

aiContextBridge.flags.astParsing.description: Analyze the active file's structure (functions, classes, imports, current function) via the local bridge.

aiContextBridge.flags.dependencyGraph.description: Build the import dependency graph and discover related files (requires AST parsing).

aiContextBridge.flags.tokenEstimation.description: Estimate the token footprint of collected context.

aiContextBridge.intelligence.maxDepth.description: Maximum depth when traversing the import dependency graph.

aiContextBridge.intelligence.maxRelatedF.description: Maximum number of related files included in context (counting the current file).

aiContextBridge.flags.contextSelection.description: Enable smart context selection and compression (Context Inspector).

aiContextBridge.selection.maxTokens.description: Token budget for the selected context.

aiContextBridge.selection.strategy.description: How files are ranked for inclusion: hybrid blends all signals; the others emphasize one signal.

aiContextBridge.selection.compressionLev.description: none: full sources. light: whitespace cleanup. aggressive: also strips comments, prunes unused imports, collapses long literals and collections.

aiContextBridge.selection.removeComments.description: Remove comments at the aggressive compression level.

aiContextBridge.selection.compressWhites.description: Trim trailing whitespace and collapse blank-line runs.

aiContextBridge.selection.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files considered for the token budget.
